sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52380" key="kakotexni/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰκοτεχν-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n52380.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κακοτεχνέω</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0400.tlg001:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alc.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
